violations.text: Establishment's Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license is expired. FMC must re-instate. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

Raw animal foods such as raw shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as bagged ketchup in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment must use 3 bay sink to sanitize dishes. Equipment to be properly adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2026
The condensate from the bar refrigeration unit is draining into itself. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024
